justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot to 3.x and Java to 21, migrating javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet and using String.formatted() (line 48 in DataController.java). However, it introduces spurious churn by removing spring-boot-starter-jdbc (line 91 in pom.xml) and deleting essential annotations like @SpringBootApplication and @Profile from HivereaderApplication.java (lines 9-11), which would break the application. The test migration to JUnit 5 is correct but incomplete without updating the test class structure.
